title: Lines, On Hearing A Young Gentleman, Who Is Both Lame And Blind, But In Other Respects Very Handsome, Sing And Play On His Violin For The First Time
meaning:
Thomas Oldham's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Lines, On Hearing A Young Gentleman, Who Is Both Lame And Blind, But In Other Respects Very Handsome, Sing And Play On His Violin For The First Time"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
